from fastapi import FastAPI
import importlib.metadata

app = FastAPI()


@app.get("/health")
async def health_check():
    version = importlib.metadata.version("myapp")
    return {"status": "healthy", "version": version}


@app.get("/info")
async def app_info():
    app_version = importlib.metadata.version("myapp")
    db_version = importlib.metadata.version("sqlalchemy")
    cache_version = importlib.metadata.version("redis")
    return {
        "app": app_version,
        "db_driver": db_version,
        "cache_driver": cache_version,
    }
